auth.brandHeadline: Real-time care for the people you love.
auth.brandDescription: Real-time vitals designed for patients, families and caregivers.

welcome.title: Welcome to TukunTech
welcome.subtitle: Choose your role to continue.
welcome.memberDescription: Sign in with your email. The system will recognize your access automatically.
welcome.patientDescription: Access your personal vitals, device and subscription.
welcome.caregiverDescription: Monitor up to 5 loved ones under your care.

subscription.expiringTitle: Your subscription is about to expire
subscription.expiringMessage: You have {{days}} days left to renew the service.
subscription.expiredLoginMessage: Access expired on {{date}}. Renew your plan to sign in again.
subscription.renewedLoginMessage: Subscription renewed through {{date}}. You can now sign in.

notFound.title: This page does not exist
notFound.description: The address may be misspelled or the page may have moved.

success.title: Payment confirmed
success.description: Stripe confirmed your payment. Your TukunTech account is being activated.
success.notice: If you just paid, wait a few seconds before signing in so the backend can finish activating the account.

canceled.title: Payment not completed
canceled.description: The payment was canceled or rejected. No account was activated.

unified.title: Create your TukunTech account
unified.subtitle: Register the caregiver first, then the patients included in your plan.

family.title: Create your Family Pro account
family.subtitle: Monitor up to 5 patients under your care.
family.registerPatientsInfo: Register the {{count}} patients included in this plan.

personal.title: Individual plan
personal.description: 1 TukunTech device · vitals · 50GB cloud storage · Mobile app and web access

individualCare.title: Individual plan
individualCare.description: 1 patient + 1 caregiver · vital signs monitoring · web and mobile access

family2.title: Family plan 2
family2.description: 2 patients + 1 caregiver · vital signs monitoring · web and mobile access

family3.title: Family plan 3
family3.description: 3 patients + 1 caregiver · vital signs monitoring · web and mobile access

family4.title: Family plan 4
family4.description: 4 patients + 1 caregiver · vital signs monitoring · web and mobile access

family5.title: Family plan 5
family5.description: 5 patients + 1 caregiver · vital signs monitoring · web and mobile access

family.title: Family Pro
family.description: Up to 5 TukunTech devices · vital signs monitoring · web and mobile access

patientAccount.title: Patient account
patientAccount.description: Each patient will have their own independent access.

personal.additionalNotesPlaceholder: Allergies, conditions, anything we should know...

medicalParameters.title: Medical parameters
medicalParameters.description: Set the personalized monitoring ranges for this patient.
medicalParameters.notice: These values belong to the patient and will be used to evaluate readings and alerts. Patients and caregivers cannot edit them.
medicalParameters.validationError: Complete all six parameters. Each maximum must be greater than its minimum; oxygen must be between 1 and 100 and temperature between 30 and 45 °C.
medicalParameters.caregiverValidationError: Complete the {{count}} patients in the plan. Each patient needs email, password, an 8-digit DNI, personal data and their six medical parameters.

validation.title: Review these details before continuing
validation.patientEmail: patient email is empty or invalid
validation.patientPassword: password must be at least 6 characters
validation.duplicateDni: Repeated DNI; each patient must have a unique DNI
validation.caregiverAccount: Use a valid email and a password of at least 6 characters that matches both fields.
validation.medicalParameters: medical parameters are incomplete or out of range
validation.patientAddress: address has not been confirmed on the map

address.patientAddressInfo: Register an independent address for each patient in the plan.

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: You will be redirected to Stripe to complete payment. The account will activate after Stripe confirms the payment.

done.title: Account created
done.description: Your patient account has been created successfully.
done.familyDescription: Your caregiver account and patient accounts were registered successfully.

registerPlan.title: Create your account
registerPlan.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits you. Accounts are created during checkout.

individual.title: Individual plan

today.ecgSubtitle: Real-time electrocardiogram waveform from the tukuntech device
today.ecgOfflineSubtitle: No live waveform is available while the device is disconnected
today.ecgNoSignalSubtitle: No live waveform is available because there is no heart rate signal

heartRateLow.title: Low heart rate
heartRateLow.notice: Heart rate is below this patient's configured range. Keep monitoring.
heartRateLow.critical: Heart rate is critically low for this patient.

heartRateHigh.title: Fast heart rate
heartRateHigh.notice: Heart rate is above this patient's configured range.
heartRateHigh.critical: Heart rate is critically high for this patient.

oxygenLow.title: Low oxygen
oxygenLow.notice: Oxygen is below the configured observation range.

oxygenHigh.title: Oxygen above range
oxygenHigh.notice: Oxygen is above this patient's configured maximum.
oxygenHigh.critical: Oxygen is above the configured maximum.

oxygenCritical.title: Critical oxygen
oxygenCritical.notice: Oxygen is below the configured observation range.

temperatureFever.title: Fever
temperatureFever.notice: Temperature meets the configured fever threshold.

temperatureHighFever.title: High fever
temperatureHighFever.notice: Temperature meets the configured fever threshold.

temperatureLow.title: Low temperature
temperatureLow.notice: Temperature is below the configured range.

temperatureCriticalLow.title: Critical low temperature
temperatureCriticalLow.notice: Temperature is below the configured range.

device.title: My device
device.subtitle: Status and connection details for your TukunTech IoT
device.alert: Your device is reporting normally. We'll notify you here if anything changes.
device.disconnectedAlert: Monitoring is disabled. Reconnect the device to resume patient status tracking.
device.disconnectedGlobalAlert: Urgent: reconnect the device. Patient monitoring is disabled while the device is offline.

history.title: My history
history.subtitle: Your recent vital signs - heart rate, oxygen, and temperature.
history.exportSummary: Export a vital signs summary report
history.noResults: There are no records for the selected filters.

profile.subtitle: Personal information, subscription, and emergency contacts.

securityAudit.title: Security & Audit

securityAudit.invalidPhone: Enter a valid Peru phone number. Example: +51 999 999 999.

modal.title: Edit user
modal.subtitle: Update role, status, and permissions for this user,

devices.title: Devices
devices.subtitle: Register equipment and assign it directly to each patient.
devices.searchPlaceholder: Search by code, model, serial, or patient...
devices.saveError: We could not save it. Check that the serial/MAC does not already exist in the backend.

form.subtitle: Complete the equipment's technical information.
form.availableNotice: New devices are saved as available and without an assigned patient.

assignment.title: Device assignment
assignment.subtitle: Select a patient and an available device.
assignment.chooseCaregiverFirst: Select a caregiver to view their patients.
assignment.rule: The assignment is linked to the patient, not the caregiver. A patient and a device can only have one active assignment.
assignment.incomplete: Select a patient and a device.
assignment.success: Device assigned to the patient successfully
assignment.error: Assignment failed. The patient or device already has an active assignment.
